/usr/bin/c++ -O2 -DNDEBUG CMakeFiles/MiniCode.dir/MiniCode_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MiniCode.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MiniCode.dir/src/editor/Editor.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MiniCode.dir/src/ui/MainWindow.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MiniCode.dir/src/syntax/SyntaxHighlighter.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MiniCode.dir/src/parser/CodeParser.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MiniCode.dir/src/lsp/LSPClient.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MiniCode.dir/src/utils/FileManager.cpp.o -o MiniCode  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Widgets.so.6.4.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Gui.so.6.4.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Network.so.6.4.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libGLX.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libOpenGL.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Core.so.6.4.2
